notes:
Design System & better-ui Polish Release.
- UI System Compliance: Theme-adaptive CSS custom properties across all desktop tabs.
- Tactile Micro-Interactions: Added active press scaling (active:scale-[0.96]) across buttons and cards.
- Tabular Numbers & Typography: Formatted financial amounts, counts, dates, and percentages with font-mono tabular-nums.
- CPU Threads display fix.
